name: Macadamia,raspberry,white Chocolate Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces White chocolate chips or chopped white chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars.
2. Add the egg and beat in.
3. Stir in the vanilla and raspberry jam.
4. Mix flour and baking soda in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the batter and stir until well combined.
6. Fold in the chopped nuts and chips.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes, or until just set.
9. Cool on wire racks.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
